▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a highly performant, dependency-free, and easily distributable version of the Claude Code application, optimized for speed and resource efficiency.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Rewritten from scratch in Go
✅ Zero Node.js, Zero Electron dependencies
✅ Single static binary distribution
✅ Fast 12ms cold start
✅ Native concurrency with goroutines
✅ Easy cross-compilation for multiple platforms
✅ Memory efficient without V8 heap
✅ 33 built-in tools


▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

🍴 17 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Gopher Code is a complete rewrite of the Claude Code application from scratch in Go. It aims to provide a single, static binary with no Node.js or Electron dependencies, offering significantly faster startup times, reduced memory usage, and easier cross-compilation.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗩𝗢𝗜𝗖𝗘𝗕𝗢𝗫 | To provide users with a private, powerful, and versatile local application for voice cloning, speech generation, and audio editing, enabling the creation of voice-powered applications and content.  🌟 Rising Fast!

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with a private, powerful, and versatile local application for voice cloning, speech generation, and audio editing, enabling the creation of voice-powered applications and content.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Local-first voice cloning studio
✅ 5 TTS engines (Qwen3-TTS, LuxTTS, Chatterbox Multilingual, Chatterbox Turbo, HumeAI TADA)
✅ 23 supported languages
✅ Post-processing audio effects (pitch shift, reverb, delay, chorus, compression, filters)
✅ Expressive speech with paralinguistic tags
✅ Unlimited speech length with auto-chunking and crossfade
✅ Multi-track timeline editor for composing voice projects
✅ API-first design with a REST API
✅ Native performance with Tauri (Rust)
✅ Cross-platform compatibility (macOS, Windows, Linux, Docker) with support for various hardware accelerators (MLX, CUDA, ROCm, Intel Arc)


┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 19.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 2.2K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 212 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Voicebox is an open-source, local-first voice synthesis studio that allows users to clone voices, generate speech in multiple languages and TTS engines, apply audio effects, and compose multi-voice projects. It prioritizes user privacy by running entirely on the user's machine and offers a REST API for integration into other applications.

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/jamiepine/voicebox

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript

✅ AI-friendly configuration and syntax for AI generation, streaming output, and rendering
✅ Approximately 200 built-in infographic templates, data-item components, and layouts
✅ Theme system with preset themes and deep customization options
✅ Built-in editor for AI-generated infographics
✅ High-quality SVG output for visual fidelity and easy editing

AntV Infographic is a declarative infographic visualization engine that uses a specialized syntax to quickly and flexibly render high-quality infographics. It aims to make information presentation more efficient and data storytelling simpler, with AI-friendly features for generation and editing.

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Save articles for reading later
✅ Remove distractions like advertisements
✅ Read content and images without an internet connection
✅ No dependency on a service/company for scraping or storage
✅ Optional authorization and cross-device synchronization (Dropbox/Google Drive)
✅ Open source, cross-platform (mobile and desktop/web)
✅ Free hosted version or self-hostable
✅ Non-proprietary integration with browsers
✅ Supports additional document types (md, txt, pdf, images)
✅ Text to Speech
✅ Content summarization

Savr is a progressive web app designed for saving online content like articles and images for offline reading. It prioritizes user data ownership, decentralization, and works locally without requiring a server or company dependency.

Mantella is a mod for Skyrim and Fallout 4 that integrates AI-powered voice interaction with NPCs. It uses a pipeline of speech-to-text, large language models (LLMs), and text-to-speech to enable players to speak naturally with game characters.

Bubble Lab is an open-core workflow engine that powers its own AI operator platform. It allows teams to automate operational tasks directly within Slack using an AI assistant named Pearl, and can be run, hosted, and extended independently for custom automation needs.
